title: Photoreceptor (Hyperspace)
content:
{{Top|real}}
{{Youmay|the [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] fan club feature|[[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptor]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] technology}}
[[File:Photoreceptor.jpg|thumb|300px]]
'''Photoreceptor''' was a feature on the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] fan club website. It showcased hundreds of exclusive, sometimes never-before-seen images of the ''Star Wars'' saga pulled from the [[Lucasfilm]] archives. As of [[February 9]], [[2006]], Photoreceptor contained 334 images. Many of these were featured in ''[[Star Wars Insider]]''{{'s}} ''[[Best of Hyperspace]]'' articles.<ref name="Best 84">{{InsiderCite|77|Best of Hyperspace}}</ref>

Photoreceptor was discontinued from further updates as announced via a blog entitled "Lucas Online by Pabawan" on [[April 17]], [[2007]].<ref name="Blog">{{Blog|lucasonline|64|What Is (And Isn't) Hyperspace?}}</ref> The feature has since been removed with the discontinuation of the Hyperspace subscription service.
